Notice Of Second Petition And Second Petition To Compel Discovery And Sanctions Against Non-Party Celgene, Corp.
Off Calendar Dec-03-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lynn Hollenbeck, Esq., Karen Diep, Esq., Diamond McCarthy LLP, 415-692-5200, appearing for Petitioner Aurora Biopharma, Inc;
Ben Picozzi, Esq., Stanley E. Fisher, Esq., William & Connolly LLP., 202-434-5266, appearing for Non-Party Celgene Corp.;
Jeffrey Faucette, Esq., Skaggs & Faucette, 415-315-1669, appearing for Non-Party Celgene Corp.;

RULING - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER AURORA BIOPHARMA, INC.'S Petition To Compel Discovery And Sanctions Against Non-Party Celgene, Corp is Granted. The prevailing party to prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312 and approved as to form to Judge Pro Tem Peter Vestal by email at pvestal@nvlawllp.com. Judge Pro Tem Peter Vestal; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
